title: Debug Running Pods — Debugging a Pod or Node while applying a profile
text:
When using
kubectl debug
to debug a node via a debugging Pod, a Pod via an ephemeral container,
or a copied Pod, you can apply a profile to them.
By applying a profile, specific properties such as
securityContext
are set, allowing for adaptation to various scenarios.
There are two types of profiles, static profile and custom profile.
